category_sources: Official Daring Fireball page describes SmartyPants as transforming ASCII punctuation into typographic HTML entities
display_name_sources: Official Daring Fireball project page uses SmartyPants
source_facts.homepage is the SmartyPants project page
docs_sources: Official Daring Fireball project page includes description, installation note, behavior, bugs, changelog, and license
repo_sources: Official Daring Fireball project page provides a source/download package but no official source-control repository URL was found
tags_sources: Official Daring Fireball page lists smart quotes, dashes, and ellipsis transformations
source_facts.description says Typography prettifier and source_facts.executables lists smartypants
